Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "REVENGEOFTHEMUTANTCAMELS-87F0" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Revenge of the Mutant Camels.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Applied the collision detection fix released by Jeff Minter on 16th May 2021 here: https://twitter.com/llamasoft_ox/status/1393933353670397960
He wrote:
After all these years I have fixed the shitty collision detection in c64 Revenge of the Mutant Camels. The game plays so much better now.
The fix changes the LDA #44 (A5 44) instructions at $9AB3 and $9ABC to be LDA #$FF (A9 FF) instead.
